title: Motor Bus Society 1948-1998 Fifty Years of Preserving History
obv: MOTOR BUS SOCIETY 1948-1998 FIFTY YEARS OF PRESERVING HISTORY (OLD DOUBLE-DECK BUS WITH 50-MBS ON FRONT) YELLOW COACH MODEL Z
rev: Good For One Tour New York, NY 50th Anniversary April 17-19, 1998
desc: Club tour token issued for the Motor Bus Society 50th Anniversary events in New York City.
notes: Brass example listed as New York CT (2), number 1. Contemporary Farebox commentary described these as thick, heavy, proof-like pieces and among the most attractive tour tokens produced. Additional off-catalog examples were reportedly struck in other metals, but only the tour tokens actually used and readily available were cataloged. Offered to collectors in 1998 for $3 plus $1 postage and handling.
usage: Used for the Saturday night sightseeing tour.

sources.title: Farebox
sources.note: Announcement notes that NY CT-1 and CT-2 were struck by Masterpiece Medallions and that other off-catalog metals exist.

sources.title: Farebox
sources.note: Notes usage, maker location, and original collector offering price.
